description: I build full-stack web applications, from the UI to the API and the database. My main stack is React, Next.js, Node.js and MongoDB, with a focus on clean code, responsive design and user experience.

aboutMe: I'm 23, based in Madrid, and I've been studying software development full-time since 2021, combining a Higher Technical Diploma, a bootcamp, and now a Computer Engineering degree at UOC.

I work mainly with the modern JavaScript stack (React, Next.js, Node.js, Express and MongoDB), with a strong focus on clean code, responsive design and user experience. I designed and built every project in this portfolio end-to-end: frontend, API, database and deployment.

I speak Spanish (native), English (advanced), Portuguese and French (intermediate). I'm looking for my first opportunity as a Junior Full Stack or Frontend Developer in a team where I can keep learning and contribute from day one.
